rulings.Case Title: U.S.BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, AS TRUSTEE FOR VS. JAMES LANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 4, 2008, line 1. Counsel for CROSS DEFENDANTS FIRST CITY FUNDING, INC AND OUT OF BK.COM'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is denied based on the holding in Mossanen v. Monfared (1999) 77 Cal. App. 4th 1402, 1409-10. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY KENNEDY VS. CARMINE AMOROSO et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, November 4, 2008, line 10. DEFENDANTS CARMINE AMOROSO AND ADA AMOROSO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifted the burden of producing evidence based on the deposition testimony of plaintiff, McManus and the provisions of Building Code section 1001.1 and the Housing Code section 401. Plaintiff fails to present evidence that raises a triable issue of fact. The building was not required to have 2 handrails. There was a handrail on the right side that plaintiff chose not to use and the fall was caused by the garbage bag striking plaintiff's leg. Plaintiff has presented no evidence that the stairs were a dangerous condition. Plaintiff's response to defendant's separate statement does not comply with CCP 437 c(b)(3) or California Rule of Court 3.1350. Defendant's objections are not directed to evidence but to plaintiff's argument in the separate statement. Accordingly, the Court has not ruled on the objections. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: SILVIA REYNOSO VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA OF TRANSPORTATION DBA CALTRANS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Grant Pltf'S Objection To Deft'S Memo Of Costs Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Tax Costs, And To Set Aside The Judgment

PLAINTIFF SILVIA REYNOSO'S Motion To Grant Plaintiff's Objection To Defendant's Memo Of Costs Or, In The Alternative, Motion To Tax Costs, And To Set Aside The Judgment. Plaintiff's motion is denied. Defendant is awarded $6790.00 in costs and fees. =(302/PJM/JW)
